subject: docs: update AI notes and mistakes for PDF 2x rendering fix
body:
Updated CLAUDE.md pdf-lib notes to reflect the new pixelRatio:2 approach
for digital formats. Added AI_MISTAKES entry documenting the overcorrection
pattern: fixing a non-integer ratio bug by reducing pixels instead of
fixing the ratio.

Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
